title: lotus ornithopus
intro: Lotus ornithopus, also known as bird's foot trefoil or big trefoil, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of lotus ornithopus include supporting digestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Lotus ornithopus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food source, particularly as a leafy green in salads and as a vegetable.
